title: Your last weight-loss journey
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - ONEWeigh, renowned experts in medically assisted weight loss and IV drip therapy, is expanding with new branches in George and Knysna.

Promoting health and wellness, the business model comprises two complimentary divisions. Their medically assisted weight loss programme promises to be your last weight loss journey.


> With a combination of products that are safe to use and do not interact with chronic medication, with an easy eating plan that 'slides' into your lifestyle, success is all but guaranteed.


Estimated weight loss in the first month is four to seven kilogrammes. Add to this confidentiality, emotional support, the convenience of virtual consultations and the option of having products couriered to your door. Short monthly consultations take place until you reach your goal weight. Then the maintenance plan kicks in, which is where the 'last' weight loss plan truly becomes a reality.

ONEJourney developed out of ONEWeigh to replenish lost vitamins and minerals through monthly IV drip therapy. Research has shown IV drip therapy to have a 90% absorption rate as opposed to a 30% absorption rate in oral administration.

The six unique drip formulations offered are IV M.A.N (for men only), Morning After (hangover), Fountain of Youth (anti-ageing), Skinny Juice (weight loss), Vitamin Bomb (immune booster) and Drained Battery (burnout/fatigue). Coming soon are optional complimentary hand massages while having your drip administered and a complimentary non-alcoholic beverage.


> Intramuscular Vitamin B injections are also available. Administrations are done by Sister Ilona Derbyshire, a qualified professional nurse and midwife.


While the George branch is already open, the Knysna branch opens mid-April.

For more information or to reach out, visit their website at www.oneweigh.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
